name: Natural Zig-Zag from PP
preceding_figure_names: Hover Telemark, Hover Telemark to PP, Open Impetus, Open Telemark, Natural Turn, Outside Swivel and Feather Ending, Outside Swivel
following_figure_names: Three Step, Change Of Direction, Hover Telemark, Reverse Wave (normal; or if ended DC), Reverse Turn (if ended DC), Closed Telemark (if ended DC), Open Telemark and Feather Ending (if ended DC), Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot (if ended DC), Bounce Fallaway with Weave Ending (if ended DC), Open Telemark, Natural Turn, Outside Swivel and Feather Ending
notes:
Do not drop R side, ribs to Man.
Man is doing swiveling through his feet. Lady changes from PP to Man's L side and then R side, OP.
Q: RF diag fwd, preparing to step OP on L side | Facing DC | T | 1/8 between 1-2 | Sway(S) | Up 
Use glute, pick up the hip fwd, Swing hip fwd and up.
Take head to L and keep head head through the rest of steps.
Do not try making connection by arching the back.
Have loose contact with Man, sliding from one side to another.
Q: LF fwd in CBMP, OP on L side | Facing DC | T | Start to turn L | Sway(S) | CBM | Up
Different alignment for Man and Lady on steps 3-4.
Q: RF to side | Backing Wall | TH | 1/8 between 3-4, body turns less | Sway(L) | Up
Use L glute to push. Swing R hip. Feather finish.
Q: LF back in CBMP | Backing DW | TH | - | Sway(L) | Up. Lower e/o 5
S: RF back | Backing DW | T | - | Sway(S) | CBM

steps.action: fwd and across in PP and CBMP
fwd and across in PP and CBMP
comments: Do not drop R side, ribs to Man.

steps.action: diag fwd, preparing to step OP on L side
comments: Use glute, pick up the hip fwd, Swing hip fwd and up.
Take head to L and keep head head through the rest of steps.
Do not try making connection by arching the back.
Have loose contact with Man, sliding from one side to another.

steps.action: fwd in CBMP, OP on L side

comments: Use L glute to push. Swing R hip. Feather finish.
